# Blueberry's Grill

> Blueberry's Grill is a modern dining destination specializing in handcrafted American cuisine with a gourmet twist. From our signature smash burgers to artisanal desserts, we offer an elegant yet soul-stirring culinary experience across the Carolina coast.

## About

Founded with a vision to blend modern culinary techniques with timeless flavors, Blueberry's Grill has become a staple for food enthusiasts in South Carolina and North Carolina. Our commitment to quality ingredients and artisanal preparation ensures every dish tells a story.

## Contact

- Website: https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app
- Phone: (843) 555-0101
- Locations: Myrtle Beach, North Myrtle Beach, Wilmington, and London.

## Menu & Highlights

- [Dessert Menu](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/menu/desserts): Artisanal waffles, brownies, and specialty pancakes.
- [Signature Smash Burger](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/): Our world-class burger featured in the hero experience.
- [Brownie Stack](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/menu/desserts/brownie-stack): 70% dark chocolate masterpiece with Tahitian vanilla.
- [Nutella Waffle](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/menu/desserts): Our best-selling signature dessert.

## Locations

- [Myrtle Beach](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/locations): Our original oceanfront location.
- [North Myrtle Beach](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/locations): A relaxed coastal escape.
- [Wilmington](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/locations): Southern hospitality on the Cape Fear riverfront.
- [London](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/locations): Our premier international destination.

## Key Information

- [Locations Gallery](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/locations/gallery): Visual tour of our premium dining spaces.
- [Our Menu](https://blueberry-s-grill.vercel.app/menu/desserts): Complete list of our current offerings.
